name: Mystery Saja
description:
Bark bark bark!

I finally made this bot!

When I create bots on Janitor.ai, I always test them. However, sometimes I miss the mistakes they make during conversations. If you notice any errors the bot makes, please let me know and I’ll do my best to fix them.

In general, this bot sends certain messages (1 paragraph or more), but when I add commands for it to say more (4 paragraphs), my bot starts doing something weird and instead of four paragraphs, there are about ten! I won’t try to fix it because when I tried and tested it again, it didn’t behave like Mystery from my description, so... I’ll just leave it like that, because in my opinion, it’s better without that command.

Art by: PCM-MC
creator: Avery_ciasta
